record.field: Users in this group cannot see contacts where 'B2B Customer' or 'Vendor' is ticked, nor contacts whose parent company is marked B2B or Vendor.
POS Group: hide B2B Customer / Vendor partners (and their children)

['|', ('id', 'in', [1, 7280, 8883, 8884]), '|', ('parent_id', 'in', [1, 7280, 8883, 8884]), '|', ('partner_share', '=', False), '&', ('customer', '=', False), '&', ('vendor', '=', False), '|', ('parent_id', '=', False), '&', ('parent_id.customer', '=', False), ('parent_id.vendor', '=', False)] if user.has_group('recreate_HangHeung.group_pos_user') else [(1, '=', 1)]
